allow: Bash(cd /mnt/d/docker_machine/anvuva/MCSPR echo "=== PID file ===" cat logs/phase1_resume.pid)
Bash(cd /mnt/d/docker_machine/anvuva/MCSPR sleep 90 echo "=== Time: $\(date '+%F %T'\) ===" echo "" echo "=== Orchestrator + children ===" ps -eo pid,ppid,etime,stat,cmd --sort=-etime)

Bash(cd /mnt/d/docker_machine/anvuva/MCSPR echo "=== Triplex_mcspr fold 2 last log \(started 01:24:39\) ===" tail -40 logs/phase1_triplex_mcspr_fold2.log echo "" echo "=== Fold 2 dir state ===" ls -la results/triplex_mcspr/her2st/fold_2/ echo "" echo "=== Last modified files under results since midnight ===" find results/stnet_mcspr results/triplex_mcspr -newermt "2026-04-21 00:00" -type f)
Bash(cd /mnt/d/docker_machine/anvuva/MCSPR echo "=== Before kill ===" ps -eo pid,ppid,pgid,sid,stat,etime,cmd)

Bash(cd /mnt/d/docker_machine/anvuva/MCSPR echo "=== Inference progress ===" tail -20 logs/run_inference.log echo "" echo "=== Caches so far ===" find results -name "test_predictions.npz" ! -path "*quarantine*")

Bash(cd /mnt/d/docker_machine/anvuva/MCSPR sleep 15 echo "=== GPU + processes ===" nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used,memory.free,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader echo "" ps -eo pid,etime,stat,cmd)

Bash(cd /mnt/d/docker_machine/anvuva/MCSPR sleep 180 echo "=== After 3 min ===" echo "GPU:" nvidia-smi --query-gpu=memory.used,memory.free,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader echo "" echo "Inference process:" ps -p 3831 -o pid,etime,stat,cmd --no-headers echo "" echo "Caches written so far:" find results -name "test_predictions.npz" ! -path "*quarantine*")

Bash(cd /mnt/d/docker_machine/anvuva/MCSPR echo "=== Lambda selection artifacts ===" ls -la results/lambda_selection/her2st/ echo "" echo "=== Full lambda sweep results ===" find results/lambda_selection -name "*.json")

Bash(cd /mnt/d/docker_machine/anvuva/MCSPR sleep 20 echo "=== GPU ===" nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used,memory.free,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader echo "" echo "=== Python children ===" ps -eo pid,ppid,etime,stat,cmd)
Bash(echo "Launched #23 VRAM probe on GPU 0 — PID $!")
Bash(CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 nohup python src/experiments/select_lambda.py --config configs/her2st.yaml --architecture triplex)
Bash(CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 timeout 1200 python -u scripts/canonical_eval.py --config configs/her2st.yaml --baseline triplex --input_dir results/baselines/triplex)
